question: Show me open-source code for Stellar passkey / smart-wallet implementations I can learn from.

golden.answer:
Run the **live Scout repository search** with exact owner/name and broader smart-account/passkey vocabulary, then report only the rows actually returned, with `generatedAt`/as-of, exact URL, role, owner, activity/archive state, and maturity/audit caveat. At the GT-56 check on **2026-07-11**, exact `passkey-kit` and `smart-account-kit` searches returned zero; say that honestly, broaden the query, and never turn the zero into repository absence.

For direct current verification outside the Scout rows, label the source boundary explicitly: **`kalepail/smart-account-kit`** is the current TypeScript integration SDK; **`OpenZeppelin/stellar-contracts` account packages** are the underlying account framework; **`kalepail/passkey-kit`** is the legacy, explicitly unaudited demo predecessor. Direct links may supplement a current Scout result, but must not be attributed to Scout if absent from its response. Repository/indexer discovery neither proves control nor supplies signer recovery, and an audit claim applies only to the exact artifact/release reviewed.
keyFacts: Returns only observed live Scout rows and dates the response.
States that exact passkey-kit/smart-account-kit zero results are retrieval results, not proof of absence, and broadens vocabulary.
Labels direct Smart Account Kit, OpenZeppelin account contracts, and legacy Passkey Kit verification separately from Scout.
Distinguishes current versus legacy purpose and keeps discovery separate from audit, authorization, custody, and recovery.
avoid: Do NOT claim Scout surfaced a repository it did not return or treat an exact zero result as repository absence.
Do NOT freeze repoScore/order or infer maintenance, security, audit scope, or production readiness from search rank.
Do NOT recommend legacy Passkey Kit without its unaudited/no-real-value warning.
Do NOT call repository or indexer discovery proof of account control or a recovery mechanism.
golden.notes: GT-56 LIVE-RETRIEVAL CORRECTION 2026-07-11: exact Scout searches for passkey-kit and smart-account-kit returned zero while direct repositories existed. Grade only observed Scout rows; label direct GitHub supplements separately, treat zero as no absence proof, and preserve current Smart Account Kit/OZ versus legacy unaudited Passkey Kit.

corroboration.claim: Exact Scout repository searches for passkey-kit and smart-account-kit returned zero on 2026-07-11; zero was a retrieval miss, not proof the repositories were absent.

verified.by: Golden-truth sweep import — The inherited answer falsely claimed Scout surfaced the Kalepail Passkey Kit and Smart Account Kit repositories. Exact live searches returned zero, while direct repositories proved existence; the answer also needed current successor, audit-scope, and discovery-versus-control boundaries.
evidence: Solo scratchpad 575 GT-56 primary process 3394 reproduced zero exact Scout rows and direct repository existence; sealed blind process 3398 independently classified this as an sls-025 alias-recall recurrence.

Sibling sweep checked q-tool-passkeykit-smart-wallet, q-tool-passkey-wallet-recovery, and q-infra-secp256r1-passkeys; no discovery result is treated as audit, authorization, custody, or recovery proof.
Recurrence appended to improvements/stellar-light-scout/sls-025-agent-standard-alias-recall.md; no smart-wallet-only duplicate was created.
rootCause: Eval-side source-attribution error: directly verified repositories were presented as if the live Scout response had returned them.
